title: Tick Control Seaford, Long Island | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Seaford, Long Island. Protect your family & pets from Lyme disease. Trusted local experts. Call today for $125-$325 treatment!
intro: Seaford's beautiful tree-lined streets and proximity to green spaces like Seamans Neck Park make it a wonderful place to live, but these same features create ideal habitats for ticks. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Seaford, protecting your family and pets from tick-borne diseases like Lyme disease with treatments ranging from $125 to $325.
whyUs: Our experienced technicians understand the unique tick challenges facing Seaford homeowners, from backyard play areas to properties bordering wooded lots. We use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks at all life stages, and we back our work with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Seaford's mix of post-war Cape Cod and ranch-style homes with mature landscaping provides perfect conditions for tick populations to thrive. From properties near the Massapequa Preserve to family homes throughout the Jerusalem Avenue corridor, our team delivers targeted tick control solutions tailored to your specific yard conditions.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Seaford?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Seaford typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. However, deer ticks can be active any time temperatures are above freezing, so year-round vigilance is important on Long Island.

faqs.question: What's included in your $125-$325 tick control service?
faqs.answer: Our tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted application of professional-grade tick treatments to high-risk areas like lawn perimeters, brush lines, and wooded edges, and follow-up recommendations. Pricing varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are your tick treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied according to label directions. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and until the treatment has dried, typically 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule tick control treatments in Seaford?
faqs.answer: We recommend quarterly treatments during tick season (spring through fall) for optimal protection. For properties with heavy tick pressure near wooded areas or the Massapequa Preserve, monthly treatments during peak season may provide better results.
